systems.title: VENOX Valvetronic
systems.desc: Electronically controlled exhaust valves. Open them for full-volume aggression, close them for a refined cruise — switched from the cabin or a wireless remote.

systems.title: VENOX Stainless Steel
systems.desc: Premium T304 stainless steel piping, mandrel-bent and TIG-welded for a deep, resonant tone. Tough, corrosion-resistant, and built to take the heat for the long haul.

systems.title: VENOX Cat-Back
systems.desc: Mandrel-bent 304 stainless cat-back systems. A serious bump in flow and note with a bolt-on install and a volume that stays neighbour-friendly on start-up.

models.title: 992.1 GT3 RS Exhaust
models.desc: A full Valvetronic system engineered for the 992.1 GT3 RS. Mandrel-bent T304 stainless with electronically controlled valves — track-day volume on demand, civil on the cruise. Supplied, fitted and tuned for fit at Duckit Motorsport.
models.review: FI Exhaust crushed it. Sounds exactly how it should — straight from the factory. Open valve, closed valve, it's all there.

models.title: G82 M4 Exhaust M-Performance Ver
models.desc: M-Performance-style Valvetronic system for the G82 M4 (S58). Deep, resonant tone with cabin-switchable valves and tip options to match the build. Bolt-on fit, dialled in on-car.
models.review: Tone is exactly what the S58 needed. Quiet on cold start, savage when you open it up.

models.title: F96 X6M / Competition LCI Exhaust
models.desc: Valvetronic cat-back for the F96 X6M / Competition LCI. Big, refined V8 character with full valve control for the daily, opened up for the back roads.
models.review: Big V8 character without waking the neighbours. Fit and finish were spot on.

models.title: Cayenne Coupe Exhaust
models.desc: Valvetronic system for the Cayenne Coupe. Quad-tip presence and a deeper note without losing the everyday manners an SUV needs.
models.review: Turned a quiet SUV into something with real presence. Quad tips look factory.

models.title: GR Supra A90 Exhaust
models.desc: Valvetronic cat-back for the GR Supra (A90, B58). Wakes up the straight-six with a sharper, fuller tone and on-demand volume from the cabin.
models.review: Woke the B58 right up. Sharper, fuller, and I can still keep it civil for the daily.

models.title: G87 M2 Exhaust
models.desc: Valvetronic cat-back for the G87 M2 (S58). Mandrel-bent T304 with quad tips — aggressive when you want it, neighbour-friendly on cold start.
models.review: Aggressive when I want it, neighbour-friendly on start-up. Exactly as described.
